## CheatReader v0.1.23

### Highlights
- Added Auto Page-Turn, with configurable page or line advancement, a 1-60 second interval, and a rebindable keyboard shortcut.
- Added automatic stop-and-notify behavior when auto page-turn reaches the end of the current book.
- Fixed HTML import for files containing comment nodes, avoiding a crash while preserving readable text extraction.

### Notes
- Auto page-turn defaults to off. When enabled, its enabled state, interval, and granularity are saved with the rest of the reader settings.
- The default auto page-turn shortcut is `A`, and it can be changed from Keyboard Controls.
- Existing bookshelf data, reading progress, and shortcut preferences continue to work as before.
